TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hibatullah_Akhundzada, title = Hibatullah_Akhundzada, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hibatullah_Akhundzada} }

S.FORM: Hibatullah Akhundzada Hibatullah Akhundzada, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Afghanistan ta' misuw hya' ga Hibatullah Akhundzada, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 16 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Hibatullah Akhundzada Hibatullah Akhundzada, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Afghanistan ta' misuw hya' ga Hibatullah Akhundzada, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 16 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ħiβatullaħ akħun*za*a ħiβatullaħ akħun*za*a, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw a*ɣħanis~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ħiβatullaħ akħun*za*a, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
